emails.subject: Re: Weekly West Update 11/29/00
emails.body: Re: Weekly West Update 11/29/00 Given the importance of this document to the traders and given that the FERC may be considering a number of these dockets at its December 13th meeting and given that the agenda for that meeting has not yet been posted, I would wait until the agenda is posted to update and forward to the traders. The FERC's agenda is posted at: <URL> From: Marcie Milner@ENRON on 11/29/2000 03:15 PM CST

emails.subject: Re: Weekly West Update 11/29/00
emails.body: Thanks Mary. I'll keep checking for the agenda and will update accordingly unless I hear otherwise. Marcie Mary Hain@ECT 12/06/2000 10:42 AM
